PenguinCardHandRank.1.2: Contains 6 or more tiles of the same suit.
PenguinCardHandRank.2.2: Contains 5 tiles of the same suit.
PenguinCardHandRank.3.2: Contains 4 tiles of the same suit.
PenguinCardHandRank.4.2: Features two different suits with at least 3 tiles each.
PenguinCardHandRank.5.2: Features two different suits, one with 3 tiles and one with 2.
PenguinCardHandRank.6.2: Contains 3 tiles of the same suit.
PenguinCardHandRank.7.2: Contains 2 tiles each of two different suits.
